title: Marysun Microwaveable Heated Cow Stuffed Animal - Weighted Stuffed Animal Plush, Heating Pad, Cozy Gift for Girls|Women|Kids|Elderly People
features: ADORABLE ANIMAL DESIGN: This animal plush toy features a charming, lifelike appearance that appeals to kids, adults, and all animal enthusiasts. Its cute facial expressions and fluffy texture make it a unique cuddle companion

RELAX: This microwaveable Highland cow plush toy is made from a soft and fluffy material that's perfect for cuddling. You can enjoy the warmth by heating it intermittently in the microwave for no more than 30 seconds at a time
CREATIVE HAIR PLAY:The animal’s long, flowing hair allows kids to brush and style endless looks—braids, ponytails, or wild designs—sparking imagination and hands-on fun
HEARTWARTWARMING GIFT IDEA:A thoughtful present for birthdays, Christmas, or holidays, this stuffed animal brings joy to children, couples, and anyone who adores cute collectibles
VERSATILE HOME DECOR: Compact and lightweight, it doubles as a whimsical decoration for beds, shelves, or desks, adding a touch of playful charm to any space
description: Directions Remove from packaging. Heat in microwave for 30 seconds. Use for comfort.
